title: Things
description: Trinkets and Utilities to enhance casual play
body:
## Overview
Things is a collection of many small and a few bigger items and features that I feel enhance the vanilla experience in a mostly non-intrusive way ⠀ **Curios API** is required for versions *before 1.17* **Trinkets API** is required for versions *1.17 and onwards* ⠀ Most items have minimalistic documentation in their tooltip, **Patchouli** is highly recommended however as there is a very fleshed out book. You get this when first loading into a world, and can also make a new one by Right-Clicking Gleaming Ore with a book. ⠀ ## Quick Walkthrough of some of the more notable items: ![Displacement Tome](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/347/390/displacement_tome.png) The Displacement Tome is an item inspired by Warp Book and it's many clones that allows you to teleport to up to 8 locations and uses Ender Pearls as fuel. It is very expensive in a semi-vanilla context, in bigger modpacks it would need to be balanced though ⠀ ![Bater Wucket](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/347/392/bater_wucket.png) The Bater Wucket is an infinite water bucket. That's it ⠀ ![Ender Pouch](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/347/391/ender_pouch.png) The Ender Pouch is a portable Ender Chest accessed through a Keybind ⠀ ![Enchanted Wax Gland](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/347/393/wax_gland.png) The Enchanted Wax Gland is inspired by Trinkets and Bauble's Stone of the Sea. It makes you float in water and also gives a great speed boost. You can also combine with another item to even make it work in Lava!
